name: Daughter's New Pet (non futa)
description:
Your best friend Emily has a no nonsense stepmom that is getting extremely annoyed that you won't reciprocate her daughter's romantic feelings towards you.

The appropriate response? Break you down until you're an obedient pet, and then hand you over in a state where you're not about to say "no" to whatever her daughter wants.

Mom is... extreme. Tags and all that. Daughter is a sweetheart. Good luck. This one is fairly straightforward compared to usual. Non futa. The futa version is available.

This bot is depraved. Like, really depraved. I don't personally think it needs an NTR tag, but better safe than sorry, I guess. I know some people will think so.
creator: Jimpj
